attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SM.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY AS RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SMRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE AS OVERRIDE_CONVERSION_RT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SMRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,-1) =-1 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS PARENT_ROLE,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_DATE AS BK_TRANSACTION_DTM,
CAST(SMRT.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_TRANSACTION_DT,
COALESCE(SMRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
NRSI.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY AS BK_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,0) AS SRC_DOCUMENT_TRANSACTION_QTY,
SMRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY AS PRIMARY_TRANSACTION_QTY,
COALESCE(NPSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,CASE WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'MFG' THEN -99999 ELSE -99998 END ) AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,
SMRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE AS PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE AS SRC_DCUMNT_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
COALESCE(SMRT.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
CASE WHEN RSL.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS GL_POSTED_FLG,
COALESCE(SMR.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,-999) AS RU_PARENT_RECEIVING_TRX_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* Added as part Q1FY15 bsanapt 10-07-2014*/
COALESCE(SMRT.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DESTINATION_TYPE_CD,
/* end of change */
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(SELECT 
TRANSACTION_ID,
SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
TRANSACTION_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
PO_UNIT_PRICE,
PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS
UNION ALL
SELECT 
TRANSACTION_ID,
SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
TRANSACTION_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
PO_UNIT_PRICE,
PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
) SMRT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMRT.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SM
ON  SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
AND SM.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM NRSI
ON  NRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT=SMRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND NRSI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPSD
ON  NPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = SMRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
AND NPSD.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT RCV_TRANSACTION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RCV_RECEIVING_SUB_LEDGER ) RSL
ON RSL.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SMR
ON  SMR.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=SMRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID
AND SMR.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION NRT
ON  NRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
AND NRT.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

SELECT RANK () OVER(ORDER BY  SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)+MAX_VAL RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
FROM 
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX (RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY) , 0) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION) SM,
(SELECT TRANSACTION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS
UNION ALL
SELECT TRANSACTION_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS)  SMRT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SMRT.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE  NOT EXISTS (   SELECT 1 FROM     $$ETLVWDB.SM_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SRT
                               WHERE  SRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
                               AND SRT.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT SCRT.TRANSACTION_ID, SCRT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCRT.CREATION_DATE, SCRT.CREATED_BY, SCRT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SCRT.REQUEST_ID, SCRT.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, SCRT.PROGRAM_ID, SCRT.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, SCRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE, SCRT.TRANSACTION_DATE, SCRT.QUANTITY, SCRT.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRT.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, SCRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, SCRT.USER_ENTERED_FLAG, SCRT.INTERFACE_SOURCE_CODE, SCRT.INTERFACE_SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCRT.INV_TRANSACTION_ID, SCRT.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_CODE, SCRT.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, SCRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SCRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRT.UOM_CODE, SCRT.EMPLOYEE_ID, SCRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID, SCRT.PO_HEADER_ID, SCRT.PO_RELEASE_ID, SCRT.PO_LINE_ID, SCRT.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, SCRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SCRT.PO_REVISION_NUM, SCRT.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, SCRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE, SCRT.CURRENCY_CODE, SCRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, SCRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SCRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, SCRT.ROUTING_HEADER_ID, SCRT.ROUTING_STEP_ID, SCRT.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, SCRT.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, SCRT.VENDOR_ID, SCRT.VENDOR_SITE_ID, SCRT.ORGANIZATION_ID, SCRT.SUBINVENTORY, SCRT.LOCATOR_ID, SCRT.WIP_ENTITY_ID, SCRT.WIP_LINE_ID, SCRT.WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID, SCRT.WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM, SCRT.WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM, SCRT.BOM_RESOURCE_ID, SCRT.LOCATION_ID, SCRT.SUBSTITUTE_UNORDERED_CODE, SCRT.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG, SCRT.INSPECTION_STATUS_CODE, SCRT.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE, SCRT.INSPECTION_QUALITY_CODE, SCRT.VENDOR_LOT_NUM, SCRT.RMA_REFERENCE, SCRT.COMMENTS, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE1, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE2, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE3, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE4, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE5, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE6, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE7, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE8, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE9, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE10, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE11, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE12, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE13, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE14, SCRT.ATTRIBUTE15, SCRT.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SCRT.DEPARTMENT_CODE, SCRT.REASON_ID, SCRT.DESTINATION_CONTEXT, SCRT.LOCATOR_ATTRIBUTE, SCRT.CHILD_INSPECTION_FLAG, SCRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY, SCRT.INTERFACE_TRANSACTION_ID, SCRT.GROUP_ID, SCRT.MOVEMENT_ID, SCRT.INVOICE_ID, SCRT.INVOICE_STATUS_CODE, SCRT.QA_COLLECTION_ID, SCRT.MRC_CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, SCRT.MRC_CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, SCRT.MRC_CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SCRT.COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN_CODE, SCRT.MVT_STAT_STATUS, SCRT.QUANTITY_BILLED, SCRT.MATCH_FLAG, SCRT.AMOUNT_BILLED, SCRT.MATCH_OPTION, SCRT.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID, SCRT.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID, SCRT.CUSTOMER_ID, SCRT.CUSTOMER_SITE_ID, SCRT.LPN_ID, SCRT.TRANSFER_LPN_ID, SCRT.MOBILE_TXN, SCRT.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, SCRT.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRT.QC_GRADE, SCRT.SECONDARY_UOM_CODE, SCRT.PA_ADDITION_FLAG, SCRT.CONSIGNED_FLAG, SCRT.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_NUM, SCRT.FROM_SUBINVENTORY, SCRT.FROM_LOCATOR_ID, SCRT.AMOUNT, SCRT.DROPSHIP_TYPE_CODE, SCRT.LPN_GROUP_ID, SCRT.JOB_ID, SCRT.TIMECARD_ID, SCRT.TIMECARD_OVN, SCRT.PROJECT_ID, SCRT.TASK_ID, SCRT.REQUESTED_AMOUNT, SCRT.MATERIAL_STORED_AMOUNT, SCRT.REPLENISH_ORDER_LINE_ID, SCRT.LCM_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, SCRT.UNIT_LANDED_COST, SCRT.GLOBAL_NAME, SCRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SCRT.LCM_ADJUSTMENT_NUM, SCRT.RECEIPT_CONFIRMATION_EXTRACTED, SCRT.XML_DOCUMENT_ID, SCRT.BATCH_ID, SCRT.CREATE_DATETIME, SCRT.ACTION_CODE, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS SCRT
  WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM NRSI
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCRT.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT=SCRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND NRSI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
SM.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY AS RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SMRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE AS UNIT_PRICE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE AS OVERRIDE_CONVERSION_RT,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SMRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,-1) =-1 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS PARENT_ROLE,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_DATE AS BK_TRANSACTION_DTM,
CAST(SMRT.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_TRANSACTION_DT,
COALESCE(SMRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
NRSI.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY AS BK_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,0) AS SRC_DOCUMENT_TRANSACTION_QTY,
SMRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY AS PRIMARY_TRANSACTION_QTY,
COALESCE(NPSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,-99995) AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,
SMRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE AS PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE AS SRC_DCUMNT_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
COALESCE(SMRT.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
CASE WHEN RSL.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS GL_POSTED_FLG,
COALESCE(SMR.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,-995) AS RU_PARENT_RECEIVING_TRX_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* Added as part Q1FY15 bsanapt 10-07-2014*/
COALESCE(SMRT.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS DESTINATION_TYPE_CD,
/* end of change */
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(SELECT 
TRANSACTION_ID,
SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
TRANSACTION_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
PO_UNIT_PRICE,
PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS
UNION ALL
SELECT 
TRANSACTION_ID,
SHIPMENT_LINE_ID,
TRANSACTION_TYPE,
TRANSACTION_DATE,
PRIMARY_QUANTITY,
PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY,
CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE,
PO_UNIT_PRICE,
PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_RCV_TRANSACTIONS WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
) SMRT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMRT.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SM
ON  SM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
AND SM.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM NRSI
ON NRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT=SMRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND NRSI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPSD
ON  NPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = SMRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
AND NPSD.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT RCV_TRANSACTION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_RCV_RECEIVING_SUB_LE )  RSL
ON RSL.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SMR
ON SMR.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=SMRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID
AND SMR.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION NRT
ON  NRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID
AND NRT.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

SELECT SMRT.BATCH_ID, SMRT.ACCRUAL_STATUS_CODE, SMRT.AMOUNT_BILLED, SMRT.CREATED_BY, SMRT.CREATION_DATE, SMRT.CURRENCY_CODE, SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, SMRT.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, SMRT.DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID, SMRT.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID, SMRT.DEPARTMENT_CODE, SMRT.EMPLOYEE_ID, SMRT.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SMRT.GLOBAL_NAME, SMRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SMRT.ORGANIZATION_ID, SMRT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SMRT.PO_HEADER_ID, SMRT.PO_LINE_ID, SMRT.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, SMRT.PO_RELEASE_ID, SMRT.PO_UNIT_PRICE, SMRT.QUANTITY, SMRT.QUANTITY_BILLED, SMRT.REASON_ID, SMRT.RECEIPT_EXCEPTION_FLAG, SMRT.REQUEST_ID, SMRT.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, SMRT.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SMRT.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, SMRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, SMRT.TRANSACTION_DATE, SMRT.TRANSACTION_ID, SMRT.TRANSACTION_TYPE, SMRT.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SMRT.VENDOR_ID, SMRT.VENDOR_SITE_ID, SMRT.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_QUANTITY, SMRT.PRIMARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SMRT.SOURCE_DOC_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SMRT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID, SMRT.CREATE_DATETIME, SMRT.ACTION_CODE, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE, 
SMRT.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_TRANSACTIONS SMRT
 WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM NRSI
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMRT.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT=SMRT.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND NRSI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
